defaultModel:
{{
  {
    collection_id: appsmith.URL.queryParams.collection_id ? Number(appsmith.URL.queryParams.collection_id) : null,
    selectedCollectionId: null,
    bookedCollections: qry_jobsheet_bookings.data || [],
    collectionDetail: (qry_jobsheet_get_coll.data && qry_jobsheet_get_coll.data[0]) || null,
    itemTypes: qry_jobsheet_get_item_types.data || [],
    loggedItems: qry_jobsheet_get_items.data || [],
    driverName: appsmith.store.userName,
    js_vehicle: null,
    js_item_type_id: null,
    js_item_qty: 1,
    js_customer_name_onsite: '',
    js_driver_signature: null,
    js_client_signature: null
  }
}}
